title: Bridge Essay: Exploring our relationship with nature: A modified-Delphi study protocol.
concept: Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.
**Phase context:** Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Exploring our relationship with nature: A modified-Delphi study protocol.** — Open Res Eur (2024). DOI: 10.12688/openreseurope.16295.1. PMID: 38911140. BACKGROUND: A vital element to understanding the the health and wellbeing of both humans and the environment is human-nature interactions. The biophilia hypothesis is referred to when discussing these interactions. This hypothesis suggests that due to evolution, humans have an innate urge to seek out nature.
